zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Legh於大約1302年出生在英國英格蘭爾爾 易亞斯特時，他的父親John de Legh Venables I24歲，母親Elena de Baguley23歲。他於1350年之前與Margaret Moulton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1354年12月在英國英格蘭波藍德易瑟爾享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Legh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Legh was born about 1302, in Cheshire East, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Legh Venables I, was 24 and his mother, Elena de Baguley, was 23. He married Margaret Moulton before 1350. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in December 1354, in Isel, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

Il a épousé Margaret Moulton avant 1350. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en décembre 1354, à Isel, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: William de Legh(이)가 대략 1302년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체실르 이스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Legh Venables I(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elena de Baguley(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1350년 이전 Margaret Moulton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1354년 12월 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드 이셀에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.
